payload.description: Bridges and Tunnels Committee Meeting held on 5/20/2024 at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY.

tool_args.label: Targeted Operation at Robert F. Kennedy Bridge

payload.description: Inter-agency task force targeted operation at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge with Governor Hochul, Mayor Adams, MTA Chair Janno Lieber, NYPD, NYC Sheriff, NY State Police, DMV, and Port Authority.

payload.event_name: 85th anniversary of the opening of the Bronx-Whitestone Bridge
payload.description: The bridge was constructed in just under two years, and opened on April 29, 1939.
Required notice for proposed changes to toll violation enforcement scheduled for publication in the State Register on May 29, 2024, soliciting public comments.
Specific proposed toll violation enforcement changes to be submitted to the Board for approval after the 60-day public comment period.
Implementation of toll violation enforcement changes scheduled for September 1, 2024.
Authority staff filed the required notice for preliminary steps to consider changes to toll payment and enforcement system.

Proposal to lower the $100 administrative toll violation fee at major B&T facilities back down to $50 and prescribe a uniform $50 fee across all tolled bridge and tunnel facilities, including the Central Business District Tolling Program.

tool_args.label: Toll Violation Public Comment Period Ends

payload.description: 60-day public comment period following publication of required notice in the State Register on May 29, 2024.

payload.claim_text: Persistent toll evaders cost the MTA money that could be reinvested into the transit system.
payload.subject: toll evaders
payload.statement: Persistent toll evaders cost the MTA money that could be reinvested into the transit system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: President Sheridan reiterated Chair Lieber's statement that persistent toll evaders cost the MTA money that could be reinvested into the transit system.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: Joint Task Force Results - March Operations

payload.claim_text: In just two targeted operations, the task force towed more than 130 vehicles, issued more than 600 summonses, and made more than 20 arrests (one for criminal possession of a firearm). For those who were toll violators, they collectively owed more than $335 thousand.
payload.subject: inter-agency law enforcement task force

tool_args.label: Joint Task Force Results - April Operations

payload.claim_text: In the past month TBTA has had eight targeted joint-operations, resulting in the interdiction of 425 vehicles, more than 3,000 summonses issued, and 89 arrests. For those who were TBTA toll violators, they owed more than $1.8 million.
payload.subject: inter-agency law enforcement partnership

payload.claim_text: Yvette Morera is the first female employee to attain the Level-Three Maintainer rank in TBTA's 90-year history.
payload.subject: Yvette Morera

tool_args.label: B&T All Facilities Revenue Collection Rate

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overall, traffic volume was 2.7% higher than the 2022 traffic volume.

tool_args.label: Toll Violation Project - Public Comment Period

payload.claim_text: Board approval sought to award three competitively solicited miscellaneous procurement contracts to Neology, Inc., Transcore, LP, and Star Systems America, LLC to provide electronic transponders and related equipment and services for the E-ZPass Electronic Toll Collection System in the aggregate not-to-exceed amount of $25 million over five years.
payload.subject: E-ZPass Electronic Toll Collection System

tool_args.label: B&T Customer Notification System for Bridge/Tunnel Alerts

payload.claim_text: TBTA customers can now subscribe to notifications for bridges and tunnels, as part of MTA's upgraded email and text alert system, to stay informed of traffic impacts and planned closures at TBTA facilities. The system enables subscribers to easily set up service alerts for any of TBTA's nine crossings, and tailor the days and times to individual preferences.
payload.subject: TBTA customer notification system

payload.scope: MTA Bridges and Tunnels non-reimbursable before non-cash liabilities
